title: Doctrine text tells the truth about both runtimes, proven by a derived gate
action: Per D1/D2. Rewrite the guardrails sentence in skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md:80 (currently 'On Claude Code these are enforced mechanically by hooks; on Codex you must honor them yourself'). The replacement states exactly three things and no more: (a) both runtimes ship hooks rendered from one shared catalog — .codex/hooks.json, 8 lifecycle events, onboarding-tracked at .bee/onboarding.json:51; (b) the enforcement floor is the shared helpers in .bee/bin/lib/, identical on both runtimes; (c) whether an installed Codex CLI actually EXECUTES those hooks is unverified, so self-honoring the guardrails remains the fallback on any runtime whose hook execution is unconfirmed. Then correct five stale doc corners: docs/02-architecture.md:219 ('a coherent 6-hook automation skeleton for Claude Code') and :221 ('hooks are Claude Code's second, mechanical belt'); README.md:312; README.md:444 (says '7 lifecycle events' — the real count is 8); docs/07-contracts.md:104 (the buildSessionPreamble payload contract, which D6 will falsify) and :216 (the bee-session-init hook-table row). Then propagate: run BOTH `node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs` (covers .claude-plugin/ and .codex-plugin/) AND `node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply` (covers .claude/skills, .agents/skills and the merged root AGENTS.md). Finally author scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs — it must DERIVE its ground truth, never compare two hand-authored lists: glob the projection copies rather than listing them, assert none contains the retired sentence, and assert the lifecycle-event count claimed in prose equals Object.keys() of the real .codex/hooks.json. That second assertion is what would have caught README.md:444.

truths: The retired sentence 'on Codex you must honor them yourself' appears in zero live copies (the docs/history/ transcript excerpt is archive, not a live copy, and is left alone).
The replacement wording preserves the unverified-execution caveat — it does NOT claim proven Codex hook parity (docs/06-runtime-integration.md:67 still lists discovery as open).
Every prose claim about the Codex lifecycle-event count reads 8, matching the real .codex/hooks.json.
The parity test derives the projection file list by glob and the event count by reading .codex/hooks.json — neither is hand-written in the test.
artifacts: scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs, discovered automatically by scripts/run_verify.mjs's glob over the scripts/ root
prohibitions: Never edit AGENTS.md's bee block by hand as the primary fix — it is merged from the template and the next render reverts it.
Never assert a hand-maintained list of projection paths in the test.
Do not touch docs/history/codex-native-runtime-v2/reports/advisor-digest-s4.md — it is a captured transcript.

trace.dropped_reason: Slice 1 re-shaped after validation returned NOT READY (6 blocking findings). Superseded by the D19-D22 shape: hook keeps anchor ownership, per-cell manifest+ledger regen, serial chain, split cells.
